nodes.name: One File At A Time
nodes.notes: Sequential processing law (A3): batchSize=1 guarantees only one file's buffer is ever in memory at once, regardless of file count or size.

nodes.name: Extract One File (try/catch)
nodes.notes: onError=continueRegularOutput: a single corrupted file never halts the batch.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "qwen2.5:4b-instruct-q4_K_M", stream: false, prompt: "Extract every factual claim from this text chunk (dates, dollar amounts, rates, percentages, requirements). For each fact, output: {fact, location_hint}. Only extract what is literally present -- never infer or estimate. Text:\n\n" + $json.chunk_text }) }}

nodes.name: Extract Facts (Qwen, per chunk)
nodes.notes: AI concurrency=1 (A14): this call is serialized against every other inference call system-wide by the orchestration layer, not by n8n itself.

nodes.name: Create Project Document
nodes.notes: Represented here as a merge point conceptually -- implementation combines the three parallel branches (funding, contacts, deadline) then writes project_document.json via a following Code node.
